content: V2.0-α: moe-brain ve trinity-oversight NestJS modül iskeletlerini oluştur (contracts, enums, DTOs)
V2.0-α: Ray local-mode resource broker stub (max %80 bütçe) + GÖZ-1 telemetry servisi
V2.0-α: 38 parite + 7 TF seed script (product_execution_config idempotent)
V2.0-α: /api/trinity/status stub endpoint + minimal DTO'lar, app.module'a register
V2.0-α: Jest unit testler (seed idempotency, resource broker %80 clamp, trinity eyes stub)
V2.0-α: yarn test & yarn build, CHANGELOG notu, kullanıcıya α kapanış raporu
